# ScriptMasterLabs

> Payment rails and AI-native tools for the agentic web. ScriptMasterLabs builds x402 / HTTP-402 micropayment infrastructure that lets autonomous AI agents pay per request in USDC on Base, payment rails on XRPL and Xahau (via Xahau Hooks), and AI-native software. Service-Disabled Veteran-Owned Small Business (SDVOSB), Kinston, NC. Founder: Timothy Walton.

## Core products
- [SML Oracle — APEX ANCHOR MATRIX](https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com/indicators.html): Flagship institutional market-intelligence engine. Built on a proprietary, patent-pending Base-4 fractal grid that harmonically binds fast trigger sets to macro anchor sets to eliminate false breakouts where retail indicators whipsaw. Powers real-time squeeze detection, options flow, and high-conviction convergence signals. Available as an x402-gated signal API (USDC on Base / Polygon / Solana).
- [CRAWLTOLL](https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com/crawltoll.html): One-command x402/HTTP-402 paywall that turns AI scraping into revenue. AI crawlers (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot) pay USDC on Base per fetch; humans browse free. `npx crawltoll init`. Published on npm.
- [Nexus-402](https://www.nexus-402.com): Autonomous AI agent layer and x402 payment infrastructure.
- [GHOST](https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com/stack/ghost): Ephemeral execution layer for autonomous AI agents. Scoped, short-lived credentials with Ed25519-signed, tamper-evident residue. The execution-safety layer beneath the x402 agentic web. `pip install ghost-layer`.
- [NeuralOS](https://www.neuralosagent.com): Agentic operating system available as a Web App and on Google Play.
- [x402 Paywall (proof402-middleware)](https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com/x402-paywall.html): x402 / HTTP-402 paywall middleware. AI agents pay per request in USDC on Base. Drop-in monetization for MCP servers and APIs. Published on npm.
- [MasterSheets](https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com/mastersheets.html): AI-native spreadsheet that replaces Google Sheets. Bring your own AI key, no subscription, purchaser owns 100% of their data.
- [Trading Indicators](https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com/indicators.html): Invite-only Pine Script v6 indicators for squeeze detection and institutional flow analysis (AMC, GME, 0DTE).

## Agentic payments
- Fast path: x402 / HTTP-402, USDC on Base, via CDP facilitator.
- Settlement rails: XRPL and Xahau (Xahau Hooks-based routing).
- Built for autonomous agent-to-agent and agent-to-API payments.

## AP2 compatibility
ScriptMasterLabs x402 products (CRAWLTOLL, Nexus-402, signal APIs) settle via the x402 protocol — the stablecoin settlement rail of Google's Agent Payments Protocol (AP2, A2A x402 extension, launched with Coinbase and 60+ organizations). Agents using AP2/A2A can pay for ScriptMasterLabs data feeds, per-crawl access, and signal APIs with USDC on Base, Polygon, or Solana.

## Books
- [Books by Timothy Walton](https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com/books.html): trading, neurodivergent survival systems, fiction, and modern-English ancient texts.

## ShortSqueeze Swarm (NEW)
Autonomous FTD/Reg SHO anomaly feed on SqueezeOS. Free public alert feed (15-min scan, new threshold-list entries + FTD spikes ≥2x): https://ftd-data-oracle.onrender.com/api/ftd/alerts
Full settlement-cycle detail (0.05 USDC/Base x402 or 0.05 RLUSD/XRPL): https://ftd-data-oracle.onrender.com/api/ftd/cycle/{symbol}
Descriptive public-SEC-data only — not trade signals.
